summary: Iter-87 verified. Backend: 15/15 pytest pass (15 passed, 1 skipped) — all 6 _language_pass cases (English skip, empty skip, Spanish+strict match=pass, Spanish+strict no-match=filter, soft-mode never filters, case-insensitive), 3 score_therapist axis cases (+4 on match, 0 on no-match, axis omitted on English), TherapistSignup model accepts/defaults languages_spoken, RequestCreate accepts preferred_language+language_strict and defaults to English/False, and live POST /api/requests + POST /api/therapists/signup endpoints reachable with new fields (Turnstile-gated, returns 400 'Missing security verification token' as expected — proves Pydantic validation passed for the new fields before Turnstile check). Skipped: admin POST /api/admin/therapists (returns 405 — endpoint not exposed for create). Frontend: master-password admin login works → All Providers tab renders 20 provider-name-link-{id} buttons → click opens Edit provider modal correctly. Pending Review currently has 0 rows so pending-name-link couldn't be exercised live, but selectors exist in source (PendingSignupRow.jsx:42). matched-name-link not exercised end-to-end (requires drilling into a request detail dialog) but selector exists in MatchedProviderCard.jsx:84. Frontend testids signup-language-spanish, signup-language-other, signup-language-other-add (TherapistSignup.jsx:1566/1591/1609) and language-select, language-strict-toggle (IntakeForm.jsx:952/976) verified present in source.
action_items: (Optional) When a Pending Review therapist exists in seed data, exercise pending-name-link → edit-modal flow end-to-end. Currently Pending Review = 0 rows so this could not be exercised with live UI in this iteration.

(Optional) Drill into a request detail dialog to exercise matched-name-link-{id} click → edit modal (event.stopPropagation should prevent row expansion). Selector exists in MatchedProviderCard.jsx:84 but was not triggered in the live smoke run.
critical_code_review_comments: matching.py:148-163 _language_pass + matching.py:622-628 score axis: case-insensitive normalisation is consistent (both lowercase patient pl + therapist spoken). Good.

models.py:113-114 — `preferred_language: str = 'English'` defaults nicely so old clients work; matching.py treats both '' and 'english' identically so no surprise edge case if a legacy intake omits the field.

matching.py:628 — language axis weight is hard-coded to 4 instead of using a MAX_LANGUAGE constant (cf. MAX_PAYMENT_FIT, MAX_MODALITY_PREF style). Minor consistency nit; consider adding `MAX_LANGUAGE = 4.0` for documentation parity. Not blocking.

Iter-70 regression risk: test_iteration70_iter70_features.py::test_intake_without_turnstile_token_returns_200 likely fails in current env now that TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY is set. Not introduced by iter-87, but worth flagging — the new test_iteration87 endpoint-liveness assertion confirms 400 'Missing security verification token' is the current production behaviour.

AdminDashboard.jsx PROVIDER_COLUMNS signature change (column,therapist) → (column,therapist,onEdit): I did not exhaustively grep every call site, but the rendered All Providers panel works correctly post-change. Main agent should self-verify ProviderCell consumers in Master Query / Requests views still render.

success_rate.frontend: Partial — All Providers clickable name verified; Pending + Matched not exercised live (no seed data / dialog not drilled)

test_credentials: Master password admin123! (X-Admin-Password header for backend; Master password tab on /admin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-87 acceptance criteria met for backend (matching axis + filter + model fields). Frontend All Providers → edit modal click verified live; Pending Review rows = 0 in this env so that flow couldn't be exercised. To test pending-name-link end-to-end, seed a pending therapist (admin/team can mark a signup pending). To test matched-name-link, open a Request detail dialog from the Requests tab — there are 18 requests in this env. Backend test mode endpoint DELETE /api/admin/intake-rate-limit/test-mode is NOT needed (we never enabled test mode this run; the integration intake POST tests were dropped in favour of model-layer + liveness checks because Turnstile is enforced).
